figures.caption: Table 4: GPTQ INT4 results under the same setup as Table 1 (K = 128 calibration samples, three seeds). Best result per model in bold. For compactness we report the two strongest baselines (Random and Max-ActVar); Max-PPL and Stratified land between Random and Max-ActVar, mirroring the AWQ pattern.

Table 1: Downstream accuracy (%) after AWQ INT4 quantization with K = 128 calibration samples. FP16 denotes the unquantized baseline. Best quantized result per model in bold. Results averaged over three seeds; per-cell standard deviations are below 0.3, so the standard error is approximately 0.17 and the COVERCAL-versus-Random gap on MMLU (1.2–1.5 points) corresponds to more than three standard errors on every model. The corresponding GPTQ results appear in Section B.

Figure 1: Budget efficiency on LLaMA-3-8B with AWQ INT4. COVERCAL at K = 64 exceeds random calibration at K = 256, representing a fourfold reduction in the calibration budget required for equivalent MMLU.
